UncompressedMXz
Base class for rdata that is like an MX record, but whose name
    is not compressed when converted to DNS wire format, and whose
    digestable form is not downcased.NFc
UncompressedMX._to_wire)
UncompressedDowncasingMXzuBase class for rdata that is like an MX record, but whose name
    is not compressed when convert to DNS wire format.NFc
z!UncompressedDowncasingMX._to_wire)
